name: Judge.me
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can integrate Judge.me reviews with Merchandising Cloud to display customer ratings and verified reviews on product cards in search results and collections. This review integration helps build customer confidence by providing social proof at the critical product discovery stage."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Judge.me integration enables you to leverage customer reviews as a conversion tool by displaying ratings and review counts directly in search results. This social proof helps customers make faster, more confident purchasing decisions by providing trust signals during the browsing phase, which can help improve conversion rates by reducing purchase hesitation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This guide provides detailed instructions on how to integrate Judge.me reviews into your Shopify store using our app. The integration enhances product cards by displaying Judge.me review badges, improving customer trust and engagement."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": Search the\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.judge.me/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Judge.me support docs"}]}, {"text": "\u00a0for detailed instructions."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Add Judge.me Widget Code to Product Cards"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Open the Product Card Template:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In your Shopify admin panel, navigate to\u00a0"}, {"text": "Online Store", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0>\u00a0"}, {"text": "Themes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Find the theme you are using and click on\u00a0"}, {"text": "Actions", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0>\u00a0"}, {"text": "Edit Code", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Locate and open the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Insert Judge.me Widget Code:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Copy and paste the following code snippet into the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file at the desired location where you want the review badge to appear:"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HTML"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
{{ product.metafields.judgeme.badge }}
", "code": true}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Save and Publish"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Save Changes:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "After adding the code snippet, click\u00a0"}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to apply the changes to your theme."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Verify Integration:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to your storefront and check a product page to ensure that the\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://judge.me/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Judge.me"}]}, {"text": "\u00a0review badges are displaying correctly."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Customization and Further Enhancements"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customizing the Badge Appearance:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "You can customize the appearance of the Judge.me badges using additional CSS. Add custom CSS to your theme's stylesheet to style the badges according to your store's design."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Testing and Debugging:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Ensure to test the integration across different products and pages to verify that the badges display as expected. If there are any issues, refer to the Judge.me support documentation for troubleshooting tips."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us at\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
